# JET — Live City Pulse

> JET is a real-time city discovery app for Charlotte, NC that surfaces trending venues, live events, and exclusive happy-hour deals on an interactive heatmap.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Live heatmap of trending venues, events, and deals near you.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to JET.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How JET collects, uses, and protects your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of the JET app.

## Optional

- [Your Crew](/social): Connect with friends and see where they're going (sign-in required).
- [Saved](/favorites): Your saved venues and deals (sign-in required).
